headline: Cisco’s Forecast Beats the Bearish Retail Crowd. Here’s the Target
summary: Cisco Systems (NASDAQ:CSCO) has quietly become one of the most compelling AI infrastructure plays in the market, even as retail chatter has turned sour. The company just posted record quarterly revenue of $15.8 billion, raised full-year guidance, and told investors it now expects to book $9 billion in AI infrastructure orders from hyperscalers in FY26. ... Cisco’s Forecast Beats the Bearish Retail Crowd. Here’s the Target
